---
title: "Manifest Shape"
sidebar: api
---

The serialized proposal manifest is intended to be nested and human-editable.

## Envelope

```yaml
format: fas_inventory
schema_version: 1
resource_id: example_inventory
creation_info:
  agency_id: EXAMPLE
  author: Field Team
  creation_time: 2026-06-01T00:00:00
  update_time: 2026-06-10T00:00:00
  version: "2"
comment: Working inventory for a field deployment.
resources: {}
networks: []
```

## Resource Pattern

Reusable resources are keyed by `resource_id`:

```yaml
resources:
  local_cartesian:
    type: CoordinateReferenceSystem
    authority: LOCAL
    code: garden_grid
    axis_order: [x, y, z]
    units: m
  interrogator_1:
    type: Interrogator
    manufacturer: Example Instruments
    model: DAS-1000
```

## Nested Path Pattern

Topology and path intervals are nested where they are used:

```yaml
networks:
  - code: XX
    fiber_arrays:
      - code: GARDEN
        optical_paths:
          - name: Garden path
            crs: local_cartesian
            optical_components:
              - type: FiberSegment
                name: sensing fiber
                optical_length: 720.0
            coupling_conditions:
              - optical_length: 470.0
                coupling_type: trench
              - optical_length: 250.0
                coupling_type: surface
```

The runtime implementation can index this nested graph internally without exposing those implementation details in the manifest.
